title: EEG: Probabilistic Learning with Affective Feedback: Exp #2
description: This dataset comprises EEG recordings from 25 college-age participants performing a reinforcement learning task with affective feedback. The study investigates the reward positivity (RewP) component and its sensitivity to affective liking during probabilistic learning. Data were collected circa 2019 at the Cognitive Research Core Laboratory at the University of New Mexico.
methods_description: EEG data were collected from N=25 college-age participants during a reinforcement learning task incorporating affective feedback. Data collection occurred circa 2019 at the Cognitive Research Core Laboratory (CRCL) at the University of New Mexico. Analytic scripts and an improved version of the task are available from the corresponding author.
